prestazioni: Engine: 6.75L N74B68 V12 twin-turbo (BMW N74-derived, Rolls-Royce bespoke calibration) – upgraded with a **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II** turbocharger (1.35 A/R, 88mm compressor, 76mm turbine) paired with a **Tial MV-R 60mm external wastegate** (set to 2.2 bar peak boost) and **Precision Turbo & Engine 1000cc/min port-injection fuel system** (supplementing the stock direct injection) for E85 compatibility. Intercooler upgraded to a **PWR Australia 4.5-core bar-and-plate unit** (1200hp-capable) with **Mishimoto carbon fiber end tanks** and **Motec M150 ECU** (full flex-fuel mapping, anti-lag, and launch control).

Drivetrain: **ZF 8HP95X 8-speed automatic transmission** reinforced with a **Sonnax billet torque converter** (3,500rpm stall) and **PPG Stage 3 gearset** (close-ratio 3.08:1 final drive). **Quaife ATB differential** (85% lock) with **GKN VL3 driveshafts** (carbon fiber center section) and **AP Racing CP9660 6-piston front/4-piston rear brake calipers** (420mm two-piece rotors, Pagid RS29 pads).

Suspension/Chassis: **Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers** (3-way adjustable, 200mm travel) with **Eibach ERS 1,200lb/in springs** and **Rolls-Royce-specific spherical bearing control arms** (polyurethane bushings replaced with **SuperPro 90D durometer spherical joints**). **HRE FF16 flow-formed wheels** (22x11 front, 22x12.5 rear) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** (325/30R22 front, 355/25R22 rear) on **BBS Motorsport titanium wheel bolts**. **Gorilla Automotive lug nuts** (spline drive, 75mm shank) for track-day security.
estetica: Aero: **Liberty Walk LB-SPECTRE widebody kit** (carbon fiber, 120mm front/150mm rear fender flares) with **Vorsteiner V-FF103 front splitter** (3D-printed carbon, 3-stage adjustable) and **Rocket Bunny GT wing** (4.5m span, dual-element, 30kg downforce at 200km/h). **Aeromotions active rear diffuser** (hydraulic deployment, 50mm ground clearance) with **Akrapović titanium exhaust tips** (120mm diameter, quad-outlet).

Lighting: **Luxxen LX-1200 adaptive LED headlights** (12,000-lumen, 5,000K CCT) with **Morimoto XB35 HID projectors** (bi-xenon, 4500K) and **Diode Dynamics SS360 fog lights** (CSP chip, amber delete). **Oracle Lighting RGB halo rings** (120-LED, CAN-bus controlled) integrated into the **Rolls-Royce Spirit of Ecstasy grille** (electroplated 24K gold, motorized deployment).

Interior: **Recaro Pole Position CS-II seats** (carbon-Kevlar shell, 6-point Schroth Profi II harnesses) with **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel** (suede, 380mm diameter, quick-release hub). **Rolls-Royce Starlight Headliner** (1,920 fiber-optic points) upgraded with **Audiotec Fischer DSP Pro 8.8** (12-channel amplifier, 1,800W RMS) and **Focal Utopia EM Evo 3-way speakers** (diamond tweeters, beryllium midrange). **VaisTech VT-4000 data logger** (12.3" touchscreen, CAN-bus integration) mounted in the **Bespoke Black Badge center console** (carbon fiber, red stitching).
